nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Montane racket-tail
nodes.summary: Montane racket-tail（Montane racket-tail，学名 Prioniturus montanus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于國際自然保護聯盟，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括绿翅雁、Stubble quail、菲律賓鴉鵑等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits tropical moist Montane Forests at elevations of 700–2,900 meters above sea level and is known to visit cultivated areas. The IUCN has assessed this bird as near threatened, with its population estimated at 1,500 to 7,000 mature individuals

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits tropical moist Montane Forests at elevations of 700–2,900 meters above sea level and is known to visit cultivated areas. The IUCN has assessed this bird as near threatened, with its population estimated at 1,500 to 7,000 mature individuals

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It faces threats from habitat loss and the cage bird trade
